name: @aipehub/example-a2a-workflow-step
description: A2A external agent as a workflow step (Stream H) — a declarative workflow on this hub dispatches a step to an EXTERNAL A2A agent over the A2A wire (message/send), then a local step consumes its reply. The sibling of cross-hub-workflow: that step crosses to a mesh PEER hub behind an approval gate; this one calls an external A2A agent that fires IMMEDIATELY (no gate). Same capability dispatch — the A2aRemoteParticipant is just a local participant that forwards over HTTP. Deterministic (injected fetch), no API key, no socket.
